TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ameenah Gurib == u siwkay niza 10 bulad 17 demiad, Ameenah Gurib, u misingkiway. 1959 a mihca nalecuhan) u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Mauritus ayza sa ci Ameenah Gurib, micakat a demiad sa i 2015 a mihca 6 bulad 5 demiad. u ngangan niza u ngangan nu Hulam: ťėŅśĘÖŚ®ú¬∑ŚŹ§ťáĆŚłÉ u ngangan nu Amilika: Ameenah Gurib kakuniza u nasuliatan nu Hulam atu Amilika Bibi Ameenah Firdaus Gurib-Fakim is a Mauritian biodiversity scientist who has served as the President of Mauritiussince 2015. In December 2014, she was selected to be the presidential candidate of the Alliance Lepep. After Kailash Purryag resigned on 29 May 2015, both Prime Minister Sir Anerood Jugnauth and Leader of the Opposition Paul Berenger positively welcomed her nomination, which was unanimously approved in a vote in the National Assembly.
S.PHON: == am…ô…ônańß gurib == u siwkaj niza ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, am…ô…ônańß gurib, u misiŇčkiwaj. **** a mińß ¶a nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan) u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu mauritus ajza sa ¶i am…ô…ônańß gurib, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad. u ŇčaŇčan niza u ŇčaŇčan nu ńßur~…ĺam: ******* u ŇčaŇčan nu amir~…ĺika: am…ô…ônańß gurib kakuniza u nasur~…ĺiatan nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika bibi am…ô…ônańß firdaus gurib-fakim is a mauritian biodi*…ôrsitj s ¶i…ôntist wńßo ńßas s…ôr*…ôd as tńß…ô pr…ôsid…ônt of mauritiussin ¶…ô ****. in d…ô ¶…ômb…ôr ****, sńß…ô was s…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶t…ôd to b…ô tńß…ô pr…ôsid…ôntiar~…ĺ ¶andidat…ô of tńß…ô ar~…ĺr~…ĺian ¶…ô r~…ĺ…ôp…ôp. aft…ôr kair~…ĺasńß purrjag r…ôsign…ôd on ** maj ****, botńß prim…ô minist…ôr sir an…ôrood *ugnautńß and r~…ĺ…ôad…ôr of tńß…ô opposition paur~…ĺ b…ôr…ôŇč…ôr positi*…ôr~…ĺj w…ôr~…ĺ ¶om…ôd ńß…ôr nomination, wńßi ¶ńß was unanimousr~…ĺj appro*…ôd in a *ot…ô in tńß…ô nationar~…ĺ ass…ômbr~…ĺj.
S.FORM: == Ameenah Gurib == u siwkay niza 10 bulad 17 demiad, Ameenah Gurib, u misingkiway. 1959 a mihca nalecuhan) u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Mauritus ayza sa ci Ameenah Gurib, micakat a demiad sa i 2015 a mihca 6 bulad 5 demiad. u ngangan niza u ngangan nu Hulam: ťėŅśĘÖŚ®ú¬∑ŚŹ§ťáĆŚłÉ u ngangan nu Amilika: Ameenah Gurib kakuniza u nasuliatan nu Hulam atu Amilika Bibi Ameenah Firdaus Gurib-Fakim is a Mauritian biodiversity scientist who has served as the President of Mauritiussince 2015. In December 2014, she was selected to be the presidential candidate of the Alliance Lepep. After Kailash Purryag resigned on 29 May 2015, both Prime Minister Sir Anerood Jugnauth and Leader of the Opposition Paul Berenger positively welcomed her nomination, which was unanimously approved in a vote in the National Assembly.
